element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player ranks Eight Virtues through tarot-like dilemmas; choice determines base character class (Bard, Paladin, Tinker, etc.)
Sixteen times larger than previous Ultima game; peaceful Renaissance Italy/Camelot setting; cities scattered across unified world
NPCs respond based on player's current Virtue levels; dialogue affects standing in virtues (e.g., bragging lowers Humility)
Eight shrines scattered across world; each requires corresponding Virtue rune for entry; meditation and mantra recitation grants enlightenment
Required to access shrines; scattered throughout world as quest progression gates
Seer in Lord British's castle provides progress reports on all Eight Virtues and directs player toward shrine readiness or behavioral correction
Puzzle-filled dungeon rooms; culminates in Stygian Abyss descent
Final dungeon containing Codex of Ultimate Wisdom; requires enlightenment in all Eight Virtues to complete
Spiritual transformation achieved by combining Virtue enlightenment, artifact collection, and Stygian Abyss completion

typical_tension_triggers: Virtue degradation through negative actions (bragging, fleeing combat)
Missing required virtues for shrine access
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Contemplative moral progression punctuated by exploration and dungeon challenges; primarily self-directed pacing tied to virtue achievement rather than external time pressure

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Shrines accessible only with corresponding Virtue runes; gating through virtue levels creates natural optional content discovery
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Dungeon rooms described as 'puzzle-filled'; suggests hidden solutions and exploration rewards

difficulty_curve.early_game: Minimal combat threat; focus on virtue understanding and NPC interaction in peaceful Britannia setting
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate complexity as player locates runes and accesses shrines; requires meditation mastery and virtue balancing
difficulty_curve.late_game: Significant challenge spike in Stygian Abyss; requires all Eight Virtues enlightened and multiple artifacts collected
notable_spikes: Stygian Abyss access (requires simultaneous mastery of all Eight Virtues)
Potential virtue loss through moral failures in dialogue

notable_level_patterns.description: Players must locate eight geographically scattered shrines, each gated by a required rune and corresponding virtue level; meditation/mantra progression at each shrine
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic shrine dungeon (example not specified in source)

notable_level_patterns.description: Peaceful cities serve as NPCs hubs where dialogue choices affect virtue standings; no combat threat; encourages thorough exploration and conversation
Multi-level dungeon gauntlet requiring all Eight Virtues enlightened; puzzle-heavy; culmination of entire virtue achievement arc
